backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as the backend entry point with no implemented functionality.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing implemented features with their IDs, titles, associated files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels — covering background music, music toggle button, and audio asset placeholder.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON object containing one-to-two sentence summaries of each frontend source file, describing their purpose and key implementation details.
frontend/IMAGE_SLOT_INVENTORY.md: Markdown reference listing all replaceable image slots across the app (13 timeline, 5 gallery, 3 journey) with their exact expected file paths under `frontend/public/`.
frontend/index.css: Root CSS file importing Tailwind directives and defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark mode design tokens including colors, borders, and chart variables.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point titled 'Romantic Anniversary Website' that mounts the React app into a `#root` div via `src/main.tsx`.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component managing client-side page routing across 11 pages with a heart-burst CSS transition overlay animation between page navigations and lazy loading for all non-critical pages.
frontend/src/components/AppShell.tsx: Layout wrapper rendering ambient romantic glow overlays, floating hearts background, and two fixed top-right buttons — a music toggle with pink glow pulse animation and a dark mode toggle.
frontend/src/components/ErrorBoundary.ts: Class-based React error boundary that catches render errors and displays a romantic-styled fallback UI with an error message instead of crashing the app.
frontend/src/components/FloatingHearts.t: Renders an animated background layer of floating heart emojis, large faint background hearts, and glowing dot particles using CSS keyframe animations. All particle positions and timings are deterministically computed via useMemo.
frontend/src/contexts/AppContext.tsx: Provides a React context with dark mode toggle and background music playback state, using a module-level singleton HTMLAudioElement for the music track.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements Internet Identity authentication via DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/clear functions and status flags through a React context provider and hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Placeholder module that exports nothing, indicating no backend queries are needed for this frontend-only application.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines the global Tailwind CSS setup along with a romantic OKLCH color palette, CSS custom properties for light and dark themes, and fixed multi-stop gradient backgrounds for the body.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers around the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/CountdownPage.tsx: Displays a live countdown timer to March 10, 2027 with flip-style unit cards, floating heart animations, and a button to proceed to the next page.
frontend/src/pages/CoupleQuiz.tsx: A multi-question couple-themed quiz component with 5 questions, answer selection, score tracking, and a heart burst particle animation on answer. Displays a results screen with score and a button to proceed to the next page.
frontend/src/pages/FinalPage.tsx: The final page of the experience featuring a celebratory layout with an animated confetti system, a pulsing heart, and a popup triggered by a celebrate button. Includes a restart option to go back to the beginning.
frontend/src/pages/HerJourney.tsx: A three-stage photo journey page ('newborn', 'teenage', 'now') displaying real uploaded images with descriptive romantic text for each life stage. Includes an error fallback for broken images and a next-page button.
frontend/src/pages/HeroPage.tsx: The landing/hero page with a pulsing heart emoji, a glassmorphism card displaying a romantic anniversary message dated 10.03.2025, and a styled button to proceed to the next page.
frontend/src/pages/LockScreen.tsx: A password-protected lock screen requiring the user to enter a specific date ('10032025') to unlock the experience. Features a blurred background, shake animation on wrong input, and a fade-out transition on success.
frontend/src/pages/LoveLetterPage.tsx: An interactive love letter page with an animated envelope that opens on click to reveal a scrollable personal letter. Includes background floating hearts, a seal/close action, and a button to continue to the next page.
frontend/src/pages/MemoriesGallery.tsx: A React photo gallery page that displays five relationship memory images in a grid with lightbox support, floating heart animations, and an error fallback placeholder. Includes a next-page navigation button.
frontend/src/pages/MonthPage.tsx: A React page that displays a single month's memory with a header image, emoji, title, and a textarea for writing a personal memory note, plus back and next navigation buttons.
frontend/src/pages/TimelineOverview.tsx: A React timeline page that renders a scrollable list of 13 monthly relationship milestones (March through March 10), each with an emoji, title, image slot, and descriptive text, with optional month-detail navigation.
frontend/src/pages/WhyILoveYou.tsx: A React page that cycles through 10 love reasons as animated cards, then transitions into a cinematic sequence with floating hearts, an infinity symbol, and closing text before calling onNext.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with a romantic color palette (rose, lavender, blush), custom fonts, border radii, box shadows, background gradients, and keyframe animations.
project_state.json: Tracks the project state (version 57) for a multi-page romantic anniversary website for Sid & Krisha, documenting architectural notes, known issues, and all implemented/existing features across the single-HTML React app.
